PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: SpeakUp conversation
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: one sustained back-and-forth between two people; use the sampled lines as evidence for what they circled around and what the exchange left behind, without inventing missing dialogue

instructions.li: whole conversation - compress the exchange into the emotional movement between its first and last sampled lines
whole conversation - let repetition, hesitation, humor, or friction matter when the evidence shows it
whole conversation - do not quote or attribute any words that are absent from the supplied samples

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: conversational and reflective, aware of both people

tones.li: close and attentive, following how the exchange shifted
plainspoken, letting the supplied lines carry the subject
